nasb.text: When Esau heard the words of his father, he cried out with an exceedingly great and bitter cry, and said to his father, “Bless me, even me also, O my father!”

esv.text: As soon as Esau heard the words of his father, he cried out with an exceedingly great and bitter cry and said to his father, “Bless me, even me also, O my father!”

cnv.text: 以掃聽了他父親的話，就非常痛心，放聲大哭，對他父親說：“我父啊，求你也給我祝福。”

ccb.text: 以扫听了放声痛哭，说：“父亲啊，求你也为我祝福！”

csbs.text: 以扫听了他父亲的话，就极其痛心地嚎啕大哭，对父亲说：“我父啊，祝福我，也祝福我吧！”
